summary.narrative: Parker won 2021 mayoral race as endorsed successor to Betsy Price, re-elected 2023 (70%+) and 2025. Focused on public safety, infrastructure, economic development, green spaces, and transportation innovation. Strong electoral performance suggests constituent satisfaction.
summary.grade_rationale: Clear accomplishments in public safety (182 new positions), green space (1,000+ acres conserved), and infrastructure investments. Limited legislative detail available. High re-election margins indicate public support. Cryptocurrency/tech innovation claims lack specificity.

promises.normalized: Expand public safety staffing and law enforcement capacity
Invest in green space preservation and park expansion
Improve essential city services and infrastructure quality
Promote innovative transportation and tech solutions including cryptocurrency

data_gaps: Specific legislation signed or pending details absent
Economic development metrics and outcomes unavailable
Cryptocurrency initiative specifics and status unclear
Budget allocations and fiscal impact not documented
Timeline for promised initiatives not specified
Detailed comparison against predecessor accomplishments missing
